synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-20912 Oracle Linux 9 rpm-ostree bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20912
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20912

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20912.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
rpm-ostree-2025.11-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
rpm-ostree-libs-2025.11-1.el9_7.i686.rpm
rpm-ostree-libs-2025.11-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
rpm-ostree-2025.11-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
rpm-ostree-libs-2025.11-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/rpm-ostree-2025.11-1.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[2025.11-1]
- Rebase to 2025.11
  Resolves: #RHEL-113380
